scripts.prisma:generate: node -e "fs.rmSync('./generated/prisma-client', { recursive: true, force: true })" && prisma generate --schema ../site/prisma/schema.prisma --generator site_worker_client
scripts.build:worker: npm run build:site && npm run build:app-worker
scripts.dry-run: npm run build:site && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.d1:migrations:list:local: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations list APP_DB --local --config ${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-wrangler.jsonc}
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:local: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations apply APP_DB --local --config ${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-wrangler.jsonc}
scripts.d1:migrations:list:staging: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations list APP_DB --remote --config ${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-generated-wrangler.jsonc}
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:staging: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations apply APP_DB --remote --config ${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-generated-wrangler.jsonc}
